Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Let me think about the activities and their typical time relationships: 1. SS - Supplier Selection: This is the starting point 2. OP - Order Placement: Follows supplier selection 3. Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me think about realistic time estimates for a high-tech electronics supply chain: - SS OP: Supplier selection might take days to weeks.
